query:
-- Brett Hansen: WA+NT, Portable Air + Pump
SELECT 'Brett' AS rep, p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.priority, p.productLane, p.sector, p.value,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS sendReadyCount
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.projectState IN ('WA','NT')
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY sendReadyCount DESC, p.value DESC
LIMIT 8;

  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS sendReadyCount
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.projectState IN ('WA','NT')
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY sendReadyCount DESC, p.value DESC
LIMIT 8;
